targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  time_bucket_gapfill('$__interval', "timestamp") as time,
  connection_id AS connection_id,
  rtc_stats_id AS inbound_rtp_audio_rtc_stats_id,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'jitter') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS jitter,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'packetsLost') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS packets_lost,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'packetsReceived') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS packets_received,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'packetsDiscarded') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS packets_discarded,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'fecPacketsReceived') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS fec_packets_received,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'fecPacketsDiscarded') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS fec_packets_discarded,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'bytesReceived') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS bytes_received,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'headerBytesReceived') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS header_bytes_received,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'lastPacketReceivedTimestamp') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS last_packet_received_timestamp,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'jitterBufferDelay') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS jitter_buffer_delay,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'jitterBufferTargetDelay') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS jitter_buffer_target_delay,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'jitterBufferMinimumDelay') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS jitter_buffer_minimum_delay,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'jitterBufferEmittedCount') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS jitter_buffer_emitted_count,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'totalSamplesReceived') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS total_samples_received,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'concealedSamples') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS concealed_samples,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'silentConcealedSamples') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS silent_concealed_samples,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'concealmentEvents') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS concealment_events,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'insertedSamplesForDeceleration') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS inserted_samples_for_deceleration,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'removedSamplesForAcceleration') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS removed_samples_for_acceleration,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'audioLevel') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS audio_level,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'totalAudioEnergy') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS total_audio_energy,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'totalSamplesDuration') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS total_samples_duration,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'estimatedPlayoutTimestamp') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS estimated_playout_timestamp
FROM
  sora_user_agent_stats
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND connection_id IN (${connection_id:sqlstring})
  AND rtc_stats_id IN (${inbound_rtp_audio_rtc_stats_id:sqlstring})
  AND rtc_stats_type = 'inbound-rtp'
GROUP BY
  time,
  connection_id,
  inbound_rtp_audio_rtc_stats_id
ORDER BY
  time
;

SELECT 
  a.time AS time,
  a.connection_id AS connection_id,
  a.inbound_rtp_audio_rtc_stats_id AS inbound_rtp_audio_rtc_stats_id,
  ((a.packets_received - lag(a.packets_received, 1, a.packets_received) OVER w) / $__interval_ms * 1000) :: numeric AS "packetsReceived/s",
  ((a.bytes_received - lag(a.bytes_received, 1, a.bytes_received) OVER w) / $__interval_ms * 1000 * 8) :: numeric AS "bytesReceived_in_bits/s",
  ((a.header_bytes_received - lag(a.header_bytes_received, 1, a.header_bytes_received) OVER w) / $__interval_ms * 1000 * 8) :: numeric AS "headerBytesReceived_in_bits/s"
FROM (
  SELECT
    time_bucket_gapfill('$__interval', "timestamp") as time,
    connection_id AS connection_id,
    rtc_stats_id AS inbound_rtp_audio_rtc_stats_id,
    LOCF(LAST((((rtc_stats_data ->> 'packetsReceived') :: numeric)), timestamp)) AS packets_received,
    LOCF(LAST((((rtc_stats_data ->> 'bytesReceived') :: numeric)), timestamp)) AS bytes_received,
    LOCF(LAST((((rtc_stats_data ->> 'headerBytesReceived') :: numeric)), timestamp)) AS header_bytes_received
  FROM sora_user_agent_stats
  WHERE
    $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND connection_id IN (${connection_id:sqlstring})
    AND rtc_stats_id IN (${inbound_rtp_audio_rtc_stats_id:sqlstring})
    AND rtc_stats_type = 'inbound-rtp'
  GROUP BY time, connection_id, inbound_rtp_audio_rtc_stats_id
  ORDER BY time
) AS a
WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY a.connection_id, a.inbound_rtp_audio_rtc_stats_id ORDER BY a.time)
ORDER BY time
;

SELECT
  time_bucket_gapfill('$__interval', "timestamp") as time,
  connection_id AS connection_id,
  rtc_stats_id AS inbound_rtp_video_rtc_stats_id,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'jitter') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS jitter,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'packetsLost') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS packets_lost,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'packetsReceived') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS packets_received,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'bytesReceived') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS bytes_received,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'headerBytesReceived') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS header_bytes_received,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'lastPacketReceivedTimestamp') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS last_packet_received_timestamp,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'jitterBufferDelay') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS jitter_buffer_delay,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'jitterBufferTargetDelay') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS jitter_buffer_target_delay,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'jitterBufferMinimumDelay') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS jitter_buffer_minimum_delay,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'jitterBufferEmittedCount') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS jitter_buffer_emitted_count,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'framesReceived') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS frames_received,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'framesDecoded') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS frames_decoded,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'frameWidth') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS frame_width,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'frameHeight') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS frame_height,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'framesPerSecond') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS frames_per_second,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'keyFramesDecoded') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS key_frames_decoded,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'framesDropped') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS frames_dropped,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'totalDecodeTime') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS total_decode_time,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'totalInterFrameDelay') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS total_inter_frame_delay,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'totalProcessingDelay') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS total_processing_delay,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'totalAssemblyTime') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS total_assembly_time,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'totalSquaredInterFrameDelay') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS total_squared_inter_frame_delay,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'totalPausesDuration') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS total_pauses_duration,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'totalFreezesDuration') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS total_freezes_duration,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'freezeCount') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS freeze_count,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'firCount') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS fir_count,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'pliCount') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS pli_count,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'pauseCount') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS pause_count,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'nackCount') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS nack_count,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'estimatedPlayoutTimestamp') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS estimated_playout_timestamp
FROM
  sora_user_agent_stats
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND connection_id IN (${connection_id:sqlstring})
  AND rtc_stats_id IN (${inbound_rtp_video_rtc_stats_id:sqlstring})
  AND rtc_stats_type = 'inbound-rtp'
GROUP BY
  time,
  connection_id,
  rtc_stats_id
ORDER BY
  time
;

SELECT 
  a.time AS time,
  a.connection_id AS connection_id,
  a.inbound_rtp_video_rtc_stats_id AS inbound_rtp_video_rtc_stats_id,
  ((a.packets_received - lag(a.packets_received, 1, NULL) OVER w) / $__interval_ms * 1000) :: numeric AS "packetsReceived/s",
  ((a.bytes_received - lag(a.bytes_received, 1, a.bytes_received) OVER w) / $__interval_ms * 1000 * 8) :: numeric AS "bytesReceived_in_bits/s",
  ((a.header_bytes_received - lag(a.header_bytes_received, 1, a.header_bytes_received) OVER w) / $__interval_ms * 1000 * 8) :: numeric AS "headerBytesReceived_in_bits/s",
  ((a.frames_received - lag(a.frames_received, 1, a.frames_received) OVER w) / $__interval_ms * 1000) :: numeric AS "framesReceived/s",
  ((a.frames_decoded - lag(a.frames_decoded, 1, a.frames_decoded) OVER w) / $__interval_ms * 1000) :: numeric AS "framesDecoded/s",
  ((a.key_frames_decoded - lag(a.key_frames_decoded, 1, a.key_frames_decoded) OVER w) / $__interval_ms * 1000) :: numeric AS "keyFramesDecoded/s"
FROM (
  SELECT
    time_bucket_gapfill('$__interval', "timestamp") as time,
    connection_id AS connection_id,
    rtc_stats_id AS inbound_rtp_video_rtc_stats_id,
    LOCF(LAST((((rtc_stats_data ->> 'packetsReceived') :: numeric)), timestamp)) AS packets_received,
    LOCF(LAST((((rtc_stats_data ->> 'bytesReceived') :: numeric)), timestamp)) AS bytes_received,
    LOCF(LAST((((rtc_stats_data ->> 'headerBytesReceived') :: numeric)), timestamp)) AS header_bytes_received,
    LOCF(LAST((((rtc_stats_data ->> 'framesReceived') :: numeric)), timestamp)) AS frames_received,
    LOCF(LAST((((rtc_stats_data ->> 'framesDecoded') :: numeric)), timestamp)) AS frames_decoded,
    LOCF(LAST((((rtc_stats_data ->> 'keyFramesDecoded') :: numeric)), timestamp)) AS key_frames_decoded
  FROM sora_user_agent_stats
  WHERE
    $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND connection_id IN (${connection_id:sqlstring})
    AND rtc_stats_id IN (${inbound_rtp_video_rtc_stats_id:sqlstring})
    AND rtc_stats_type = 'inbound-rtp'
  GROUP BY time, connection_id, inbound_rtp_video_rtc_stats_id
  ORDER BY time
) AS a
WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY a.connection_id, a.inbound_rtp_video_rtc_stats_id ORDER BY a.time)
ORDER BY time
;

SELECT
  time_bucket_gapfill('$__interval', "timestamp") as time,
  connection_id AS connection_id,
  rtc_stats_id AS inbound_rtp_video_rtc_stats_id,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'dataChannelIdentifier') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS data_channel_identifier,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'messagesSent') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS messages_sent,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'bytesSent') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS bytes_sent,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'messagesReceived') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS messages_received,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'bytesReceived') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS bytes_received
FROM
  sora_user_agent_stats
WHERE
  $__timeFilter(timestamp)
  AND connection_id IN (${connection_id:sqlstring})
  AND rtc_stats_id IN (${data_channel_rtc_stats_id:sqlstring})
  AND rtc_stats_type = 'data-channel'
GROUP BY
  time,
  connection_id,
  rtc_stats_id
ORDER BY
  time
;

SELECT 
  a.time AS time,
  a.connection_id AS connection_id,
  a.data_channel_rtc_stats_id AS data_channel_rtc_stats_id,
  ((a.messages_sent - lag(a.messages_sent, 1, NULL) OVER w) / $__interval_ms * 1000) :: numeric AS "messagesSent/s",
  ((a.bytes_sent - lag(a.bytes_sent, 1, a.bytes_sent) OVER w) / $__interval_ms * 1000 * 8) :: numeric AS "bytesSent_in_bits/s",
  ((a.messages_received - lag(a.messages_received, 1, NULL) OVER w) / $__interval_ms * 1000) :: numeric AS "messagesReceived/s",
  ((a.bytes_received - lag(a.bytes_received, 1, a.bytes_received) OVER w) / $__interval_ms * 1000 * 8) :: numeric AS "bytesReceived_in_bits/s"
FROM (
  SELECT
    time_bucket_gapfill('$__interval', "timestamp") as time,
    connection_id AS connection_id,
    rtc_stats_id AS data_channel_rtc_stats_id,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'messagesSent') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS messages_sent,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'bytesSent') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS bytes_sent,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'messagesReceived') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS messages_received,
  LOCF(LAST(((rtc_stats_data ->> 'bytesReceived') :: numeric), timestamp)) AS bytes_received
  FROM sora_user_agent_stats
  WHERE
    $__timeFilter(timestamp)
    AND connection_id IN (${connection_id:sqlstring})
    AND rtc_stats_id IN (${data_channel_rtc_stats_id:sqlstring})
    AND rtc_stats_type = 'data-channel'
  GROUP BY time, connection_id, data_channel_rtc_stats_id
  ORDER BY time
) AS a
WINDOW w AS (PARTITION BY a.connection_id, a.data_channel_rtc_stats_id ORDER BY a.time)
ORDER BY time
;

list.definition:
SELECT
  connection_id
FROM sora_connection
WHERE
  channel_id IN (${channel_id:sqlstring})
  AND session_id IN (${session_id:sqlstring})
;
list.label: Connection ID
list.name: connection_id
list.query:
SELECT
  connection_id
FROM sora_connection
WHERE
  channel_id IN (${channel_id:sqlstring})
  AND session_id IN (${session_id:sqlstring})
;

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
  rtc_stats_id
FROM sora_user_agent_stats
WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp")
  AND connection_id IN (${connection_id:sqlstring})
  AND rtc_stats_type = 'inbound-rtp'
  AND rtc_stats_data->>'kind' = 'audio'
ORDER BY rtc_stats_id;
list.label: inbound-rtp audio RTC Stats ID
list.name: inbound_rtp_audio_rtc_stats_id
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
  rtc_stats_id
FROM sora_user_agent_stats
WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp")
  AND connection_id IN (${connection_id:sqlstring})
  AND rtc_stats_type = 'inbound-rtp'
  AND rtc_stats_data->>'kind' = 'audio'
ORDER BY rtc_stats_id;

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
  rtc_stats_id
FROM sora_user_agent_stats
WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp")
  AND connection_id IN (${connection_id:sqlstring})
  AND rtc_stats_type = 'inbound-rtp'
  AND rtc_stats_data->>'kind' = 'video'
ORDER BY rtc_stats_id;
list.label: inbound-rtp video RTC Stats ID
list.name: inbound_rtp_video_rtc_stats_id
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
  rtc_stats_id
FROM sora_user_agent_stats
WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp")
  AND connection_id IN (${connection_id:sqlstring})
  AND rtc_stats_type = 'inbound-rtp'
  AND rtc_stats_data->>'kind' = 'video'
ORDER BY rtc_stats_id;

list.definition:
SELECT DISTINCT
  concat(rtc_stats_id, ' ', rtc_stats_data->>'label') AS id
FROM sora_user_agent_stats
WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp")
  AND connection_id IN (${connection_id:sqlstring})
  AND rtc_stats_type = 'data-channel'
ORDER BY id;
list.label: Data Channel RTC Stats ID
list.name: data_channel_rtc_stats_id
list.query:
SELECT DISTINCT
  concat(rtc_stats_id, ' ', rtc_stats_data->>'label') AS id
FROM sora_user_agent_stats
WHERE $__timeFilter("timestamp")
  AND connection_id IN (${connection_id:sqlstring})
  AND rtc_stats_type = 'data-channel'
ORDER BY id;
